# LongPro Pest Control

> Discreet residential pest control serving Cleveland, OH and Greater Cuyahoga County. BBB A+ rated for 13+ years. Unmarked vehicles, confidential service.

## Business Info

- Name: LongPro Pest Control LLC
- Also known as: The Pest Detective
- Phone: (216) 300-4121
- Email: info@longpropc.com
- Location: Cleveland, OH
- Service radius: 25 miles (Greater Cleveland & Cuyahoga County)
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 8AM–6PM
- Website: https://longpropc.com

## Services

- [Bed Bug Extermination](https://longpropc.com/services/bed-bug-extermination/): Cleveland's most discreet bed bug treatment. Thorough inspection, targeted treatment, guaranteed results.
- [Cockroach Extermination](https://longpropc.com/services/cockroach-extermination/): German, American, and Oriental cockroach treatment for Cleveland homes.
- [Ant & Spider Control](https://longpropc.com/services/ant-and-spider-control/): Interior and perimeter treatment for lasting protection against ants and spiders.
- [Flea Extermination](https://longpropc.com/services/flea-extermination/): Break the flea lifecycle with professional treatment. Coordinated home and pet protection.

## What Makes LongPro Different

LongPro specializes in discreet pest control. All service vehicles are unmarked — no pest control branding. No yard signs, no visible equipment. Neighbors never know. Every job is treated with complete privacy and confidentiality.

## Service Area

Cleveland and surrounding communities within a 25-mile radius including Lakewood, Parma, Euclid, Mentor, and all of Greater Cuyahoga County.
